posts.content: We are hiring! Looking for a Full Stack Developer (MERN Stack) to join our team at TechCorp India. 2+ years of experience with React, Node.js, and MongoDB required. Remote friendly. Send your resume to priya.sharma@techcorp.in or DM me directly. #hiring #reactjs #nodejs #fullstack

Excited to announce that StartupHub is expanding! We need a Frontend Developer with expertise in React.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Experience with Next.js is a plus. Competitive salary + ESOPs. Interested? Drop your CV at careers@startuphub.io. Location: Bangalore/Remote. #frontend #react #hiring #startup

Just launched our new AI-powered analytics dashboard! Really proud of what the team has achieved. Built with Python, TensorFlow, and React. The power of data visualization is incredible. #tech #ai #datascience

Urgent Hiring! FinServe Technologies is looking for:

1. Node.js Backend Developer (2-4 yrs)
2. React Frontend Developer (1-3 yrs)
3. DevOps Engineer (3+ yrs)

Tech Stack: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, AWS, Docker

Location: Gurugram (Hybrid)
CTC: Competitive + Benefits

Interested candidates please send your resume to neha.gupta@finserve.com with the subject line mentioning the role.

#hiring #nodejs #react #devops #jobs #gurugram

5 design principles every product designer should follow in 2025. A thread. 1. User-first thinking 2. Accessibility by default 3. Design systems over individual screens 4. Prototype before pixel-perfecting 5. Data-informed decisions. What would you add? #design #ux #productdesign

We're building something exciting at WebNova and need passionate developers to join us!

Open Role: Full Stack JavaScript Developer
Experience: 1-3 years
Must have: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB
Good to have: TypeScript, AWS, Docker, Redis

What we offer: Competitive pay, flexible hours, learning budget, and a great team.

DM me or email your resume at jobs@webnova.dev

RT to help someone find their next opportunity! #hiring #javascript #webdev

My team is hiring a Senior React Developer at MegaSoft! If you love building scalable web applications and have 3+ years with React, Redux, and REST APIs, I want to hear from you. We work with Next.js, TypeScript, and deploy on AWS. Great work-life balance and competitive compensation. Reach out to me or apply through our careers page. #hiring #react #senior
